title: romulea multifida
intro: Romulea multifida is a species of flowering plant in the family Iridaceae, native to South Africa. It is known for its medicinal properties, primarily due to the presence of iridoid glycosides and flavonoids in its roots and leaves. The plant has been traditionally used to treat various health issues, including fever, rheumatism, and gastrointestinal problems, thanks to its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. Romulea multifida can be consumed as an herbal tea or infusion, and its roots can also be used to make a decoction for medicinal purposes.
